features.name: signed_arithmetic_shift_left_on_negative_literal
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic left shift (<<<) operation on a negative signed literal where the result is used in a context expecting a signed value

features.name: signed_logical_shift_left_on_negative_literal
features.description: Code should include a logical left shift (<<) operation on a negative signed literal where the result type should remain signed per Verilog standard
